empty.title: No children yet
empty.desc: Tap the button in the top right to start tracking!

editChild.title: Edit Profile
editChild.deleteAlertMsg: All records for "{{name}}" will be permanently deleted. Are you sure?

addMeasurement.title: Record Height
addMeasurement.alertHeightInvalid: Please enter a height between 30 and 250 cm

childDetail.noRecordsDesc: Tap the button below to add the first measurement

deleteRecord.title: Delete this record?
deleteRecord.msg: The height record from {{date}} will be permanently deleted.

deleteWeightRecord.title: Delete this record?
deleteWeightRecord.msg: The weight record from {{date}} will be permanently deleted.

childDetail.noWeightRecordsDesc: Tap the button below to add the first weight measurement

analysis.disclaimer: For reference only. Final height depends on puberty, genetics, nutrition, sleep, and overall health.

percentileModal.title: What is Percentile (Pxx)?
percentileModal.body1: Percentile shows where your child's height ranks among children of the same age and sex.
percentileModal.body2: means your child is taller than 68% of peers and shorter than the remaining 32%.
percentileModal.attention: P3 – P10 or P90 – P97  Slightly low/high, worth monitoring
percentileModal.warning: Below P3 or above P97  Consult a doctor
percentileModal.disclaimer: Percentile is for reference only. Tracking trends over time matters more than a single reading.

childDetail.gestureHintZoomed: Drag to pan · Pinch to zoom

addWeightMeasurement.title: Record Weight
addWeightMeasurement.alertWeightInvalid: Please enter a weight between 1 and 200 kg

weightFeature.alertMessage: Unlock weight growth charts to track your child's weight and compare with age-matched percentiles.

weightPage.title: Weight Curve
weightPage.subtitle: One-time purchase · Unlock forever
features: Record your child's weight & plot full growth curves
Compare percentiles with WHO, Japan & China standards
weightPage.legalText: Tapping "Unlock Now" will charge your Apple ID account. This is a one-time, non-consumable purchase with no subscription fees. Available on all devices signed in with the same Apple ID.

japan.label: Japan Standard
japan.description: Based on Japan government statistics (e-Stat) infant and school health surveys

who.label: WHO Standard
who.description: Based on WHO Length/height-for-age reference data

china.label: China Standard
china.description: Based on data from China's National Health Commission
